title: Ethan's Vanilla Tweaks
description: Spice up your vanilla world with Ethan's Vanilla Tweaks!
body:
Have you ever gotten bored of plain old vanilla Minecraft? Well, EVT was created to change that! This is a work-in-progress mod that will be continuously updated. It features brand-new enchants, new crafting recipes, and other things coming soon(tm).

## Current list of features:

- Adds new enchants for a dynamic yet subtle tweak to combat
- Adds new recipes for previously un-craftable items
- Adds back some deleted recipes

That is it so far, but a new update is coming soon!

### Requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API
